steps.title: Find the y-intercept condition
steps.content:
The y‑intercept occurs when the input equals zero.
$$x=0$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function at x=0
steps.content:
Substitute $$x=0$$ into $$f(x)=2x-\frac{1}{4}$$:
$$f(0)=2(0)-\frac{1}{4}=-\frac{1}{4}$$
Thus the y‑intercept is $$\left(0,-\frac{1}{4}\right)$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
